name: SkillsForThings
description: Claude Code skills for multi-agent builds, prompt engineering, research, plugin maintenance, and memory visualization

plugins.name: conductor
plugins.description: Coordinate a fleet of subagents — delegate owned units, review with a dual-model critic, trace the seams, integrate. Includes the atomic fan / critic primitives and the autonomous long-build family.

plugins.name: misc
plugins.description: Assorted process skills for research, terminology, copy, long-build orchestration, and technical communication

plugins.name: prompt-tuning
plugins.description: Skills for optimizing LLM prompts across multiple axes — cache hit rate, latency, cost, structure

plugins.name: plugin-ops
plugins.description: Skills for maintaining Claude Code plugins — refreshing skill content against current evidence, validating manifests, auditing for stale claims and origin leaks before publishing

plugins.name: memory-mood
plugins.description: Visualize the emotional arc of an AI assistant's accumulating memory — replay your assistant's notes-to-self in formation order and chart how each new memory shifts its mood
